7 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
8 /* CsrFormatMatrix.h (C) 2022-2026 */
9 /* */
10 /* Container for Matrix using CSR format. */
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
13 #ifndef ARCANEFEM_FEMUTILS_CSRFORMATMATRIX_H
14 #define ARCANEFEM_FEMUTILS_CSRFORMATMATRIX_H
15 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
16 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
17 
18 #include <arcane/utils/FatalErrorException.h>
19 #include <arcane/utils/NumArray.h>
20 
21 #include <arcane/VariableTypes.h>
22 #include <arcane/IItemFamily.h>
23 
24 #include "FemUtils.h"
25 #include "CsrFormatMatrixView.h"
26 
27 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
28 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
29 
30 namespace Arcane::FemUtils
31 {
32 class DoFLinearSystem;
33 
34 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
35 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
36 
37 class CsrFormat
38 : public TraceAccessor
39 {
40  public:
41 
42  explicit CsrFormat(Arcane::ITraceMng* tm)
43  : TraceAccessor(tm)
44  {
45  }
46 
47  public:
48 
49  void initialize(IItemFamily* dof_family, Int32 nnz, Int32 nbRow, RunQueue& queue);
50 
58  void matrixAddValue(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column, Real value)
59  {
60  if (row.isNull())
61  ARCANE_FATAL("Row is null");
62  if (column.isNull())
63  ARCANE_FATAL("Column is null");
64  if (value == 0.0)
65  return;
66  m_matrix_value(indexValue(row, column)) += value;
67  }
68 
69  Int32 indexValue(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column)
70  {
71  Int32 begin = m_matrix_row(row.localId());
72  Int32 end = 0;
73  if (row.localId() == m_matrix_row.extent0() - 1) {
74 
75  end = m_matrix_column.extent0();
76  }
77  else {
78 
79  end = m_matrix_row(row + 1);
80  }
81  for (Int32 i = begin; i < end; i++) {
82  if (m_matrix_column(i) == column.localId()) {
83  return i;
84  }
85  }
86  return -1;
87  }
88 
94  void translateToLinearSystem(DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, const RunQueue& queue);
95 
102  void printMatrix(std::string fileName);
103 
104  // Warning : does not support empty row (or does it ?)
105  void setCoordinates(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column)
106  {
107  Int32 row_lid = row.localId();
108  if (m_matrix_row(row_lid) == -1) {
109  m_matrix_row(row_lid) = m_last_value;
110  }
111  m_matrix_column(m_last_value) = column.localId();
112  m_last_value++;
113  }
114 
115  void matrixSetValue(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column, Real value)
116  {
117  m_matrix_value(indexValue(row, column)) = value;
118  }
119 
121  CsrFormatMatrixView view();
122 
123  public:
124 
125  Int32 m_nnz = 0;
126  // To become parallelizable, have all the index
127  // inside a queue that would gradually pop ?
128  // or link the idnex to the index of the core ?
129  Int32 m_last_value = 0;
130  NumArray<Int32, MDDim1> m_matrix_row;
131  NumArray<Int32, MDDim1> m_matrix_column;
132  NumArray<Real, MDDim1> m_matrix_value;
134  NumArray<Int32, MDDim1> m_matrix_rows_nb_column;
135  IItemFamily* m_dof_family = nullptr;
136 
138  Int32 getValue(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column)
139  {
140  return m_matrix_value(indexValue(row, column));
141  }
142 };
143 
144 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
145 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
146 
147 } // namespace Arcane::FemUtils
148

150 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
151 
152 #endif

void translateToLinearSystem(DoFLinearSystem &linear_system, const RunQueue &queue)
